Patch Set 2:

The Verify build appears to have failed the so-master-verify-csit-integration-etsi-testing job (https://jenkins.onap.org/job/so-master-verify-csit-integration-etsi-testing/191/) as it hasn't picked up the latest changes from my previous review. In the console logs you can see the mariadb container is still using the older image: nexus3.onap.org:10001/mariadb:10.1.11

This is probably due to the merge job on my previous review (https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/integration/csit/+/118052) still failing due to the so-master-verify-csit-macroflow issue.
Patch Set 3: Patch Set 2 was rebased

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> The Verify build appears to have failed the so-master-verify-csit-integration-etsi-testing job (https://jenkins.onap.org/job/so-master-verify-csit-integration-etsi-testing/191/) as it hasn't picked up the latest changes from my previous review. In the console logs you can see the mariadb container is still using the older image: nexus3.onap.org:10001/mariadb:10.1.11
> 
> This is probably due to the merge job on my previous review (https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/integration/csit/+/118052) still failing due to the so-master-verify-csit-macroflow issue.

Although pulling the Master CSIT code, my previous reviews changes appear to be there, so this could be due to the Jenkins job not using the latest code, this might explain why the job was not failing before when it should have.

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> The Verify build appears to have failed the so-master-verify-csit-integration-etsi-testing job (https://jenkins.onap.org/job/so-master-verify-csit-integration-etsi-testing/191/) as it hasn't picked up the latest changes from my previous review. In the console logs you can see the mariadb container is still using the older image: nexus3.onap.org:10001/mariadb:10.1.11
> 
> This is probably due to the merge job on my previous review (https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/integration/csit/+/118052) still failing due to the so-master-verify-csit-macroflow issue.

Branch is merged to master immediately on submit regardless of the result of the triggered merge jobs, so that can not be the reason (side note: Jenkins job templates in ci-management are a special case - there the triggered merge jobs actually create the Jenkins jobs from templates and must succeed in order for the changes to take effect)

Let's see what rebase does before investigating further

> BTW,
> 
> > > The Verify build appears to have failed the so-master-verify-csit-integration-etsi-testing job (https://jenkins.onap.org/job/so-master-verify-csit-integration-etsi-testing/191/)
> 
> Is this failure the same you were getting locally?

Yes this is the same failure we were getting locally. It continues to wait for the pods to spin up but eventually times out. Then if we simply updated the MariaDB version to one greater than 10.1.11 we then received errors from on the NFVO container when it attempted to create it's tables in the MariaDB

Patch Set 3: Verified+1 Code-Review+2

> Patch Set 3:
> 
> > Patch Set 3:
> > 
> > BTW,
> > 
> > > > The Verify build appears to have failed the so-master-verify-csit-integration-etsi-testing job (https://jenkins.onap.org/job/so-master-verify-csit-integration-etsi-testing/191/)
> > 
> > Is this failure the same you were getting locally?
> 
> Yes this is the same failure we were getting locally. It continues to wait for the pods to spin up but eventually times out. Then if we simply updated the MariaDB version to one greater than 10.1.11 we then received errors from on the NFVO container when it attempted to create it's tables in the MariaDB

Very well, it wasn't then a matter of *where* but *when*, and it just happened to break down just yesterday between the last time this got executed in Jenkins and first time you tried it locally. Case closed :D
Change has been successfully merged by Lasse Kaihlavirta
